aadhaar_card.instructions: Extract the unique 12-digit identity number, full legal name, date of birth, and gender exactly as written on the front or back of the card.

uid.description: The 12-digit identity number without spaces or hyphens (e.g., 123456789012).

name.description: The full name of the cardholder spelled exactly as it appears.

dob.description: The date of birth in DD/MM/YYYY format.

gender.description: Gender value, normalized strictly to 'Male', 'Female', or 'Other'.

pan_card.instructions: Extract the 10-character alphanumeric Permanent Account Number, cardholder name, father's name, and date of birth.

father_name.description: The cardholder's father's name as printed on the face of the card.

dob.description: Date of birth in DD/MM/YYYY format.

passport.instructions: Extract document number, full name, date of birth, nationality, and expiry date from the passport bio page.

full_name.description: The full given name and surname combined.

dob.description: Date of birth in YYYY-MM-DD or DD/MM/YYYY format.

nationality.description: The country code or name of nationality.

cv_bgv.instructions: Extract applicant name, email, structural list of work experiences, and highest educational degree qualifications.

skills.description: Comma-separated list or block text of identified technical proficiencies.

birth_certificate.instructions: Extract the child's name, date of birth, place of birth, father's name, and mother's name.

driving_licence.instructions: Extract licence number, name, date of birth, and validity expiry date.

marriage.instructions: Extract husband's name, wife's name, and date of marriage registration.

marriage_date.description: Date marriage was solemnized or registered.

employment_certificate.instructions: Extract company name, employee name, designation, date of joining, and date of leaving.

date_of_leaving.description: Relieving date or null if currently employed.

internship_certificate.instructions: Extract organization name, intern name, project title, and internship duration details.

duration.description: Total duration or date range of the internship.

tenth_marksheet.instructions: Extract roll number, student name, board name, passing year, and final percentage or GPA.

percentage.description: Final aggregate percentage or grade obtained.

twelfth_marksheet.instructions: Extract roll number, student name, board name, stream, passing year, and aggregate marks details.

transfer_certificate.instructions: Extract institution name, student name, admission number, and date of issue.

institution_name.description: Name of the school or college leaving from.

admission_number.description: Unique admission register code identification number.

voter_id.instructions: Extract EPIC card identifier number, name, relation name, and date of birth.

epic_number.description: The unique alphanumeric EPIC code card identification number.

relation_name.description: Father's or Spouse's name printed on the card face.

dob.description: Date of birth or estimated age description value.
